title: Repair vehicle structural damage by riveting
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Repair vehicle structural damage by riveting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair riveted structural damage

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret structural repair and riveting information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check materials for repair for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret structural repair and riveting information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check materials for repair for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret structural repair and riveting information from original equipment manufacturer (OEM) or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures1.3 Select and check materials for repair for quality1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks1.5 Select tools and equipment and check for serviceability1.6 Prepare work area and plan work to minimise waste and use time efficiently.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair riveted structural damage

elements.title: Carry out structural riveting procedures

pcs.text: Repair or replace components according to OEM or approved agency’s riveting procedures, and equipment, safety and environmental requirements2.2 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and riveting of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Repair or replace components according to OEM or approved agency’s riveting procedures, and equipment, safety and environmental requirements2.2 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and riveting of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Repair or replace components according to OEM or approved agency’s riveting procedures, and equipment, safety and environmental requirements2.2 Seek assistance from authorised personnel where straightening, realigning and riveting of components disturb vehicle trim or electrical, mechanical or air conditioning systems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out structural riveting procedures

elements.title: Carry out body measuring procedures

pcs.text: Measure repaired and riveted structural components using workplace instructions and OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and equipment3.2 Carry out measuring activities and compare measurements with OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure repaired and riveted structural components using workplace instructions and OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and equipment3.2 Carry out measuring activities and compare measurements with OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure repaired and riveted structural components using workplace instructions and OEM or authorised agency’s approved methods and equipment3.2 Carry out measuring activities and compare measurements with OEM or authorised agency’s specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Carry out body measuring procedures

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
